messages.content: Analyze the data using available tools.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a given city. Returns temperature in Celsius, humidity percentage, wind speed, and general conditions description. The city name must be a valid ISO-recognized city name in English.

city.description: The city name to get weather for, e.g. 'Tokyo', 'London', 'New York'

tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Search through the company knowledge base for documents matching the given query. Uses semantic search to find the most relevant documents. Supports filtering by document type, date range, and author.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-50)

tools.name: calculate_metrics
tools.description: Perform statistical calculations on a provided dataset. Supports mean, median, standard deviation, percentiles, and correlation analysis. Input data can be provided as a JSON array of numbers or key-value pairs.

data.description: Array of numeric values to compute metrics for

group_by.description: Optional categorical column for grouped statistics

tools.name: send_notification
tools.description: Send a notification to specified channels. Supports email, Slack, and webhook delivery. Message content supports Markdown formatting.

recipient.description: Recipient email address, Slack channel ID, or webhook URL

body.description: Notification body content in Markdown format

tools.name: query_database
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL query against the analytics database. Supports SELECT statements with JOINs, aggregations, and window functions. Results are returned as a JSON array of row objects.

max_rows.description: Maximum number of rows to return (1-10000)

tools.name: create_schedule
tools.description: Create a scheduled task or recurring event. Supports one-time and recurring schedules with cron expressions. Can trigger webhooks, send notifications, or run reports.

name.description: Human-readable name for the scheduled task

action.description: The action to perform on schedule trigger

tools.name: analyze_sentiment
tools.description: Analyze the sentiment of given text using NLP models. Returns sentiment scores (positive, negative, neutral), confidence levels, and detected entities. Supports multiple languages.

text.description: Text content to analyze for sentiment

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the input text

entity_extraction.description: Whether to also extract named entities

tools.name: generate_chart
tools.description: Generate a chart or visualization from provided data. Supports line charts, bar charts, pie charts, scatter plots, and heatmaps. Output can be PNG, SVG, or interactive HTML.

color_scheme.description: Named color scheme for the chart
